title: OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS - 211info
text: MEDFORD OUTPATIENT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive outpatient treatment for substance use, mental health, and co-occurring conditions. Also provides gambling disorder counseling, partial hospitalization, and day treatment. 300 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Outpatient: Unrestricted Partial hospitalization or day treatment: Individuals with severe mental illness and substance use disorders Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 772-1777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-1777 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Outpatient: Walk in or call for more information Partial Hospitalization or Day Treatment: Must be referred FEES: Oregon Health Plan (OHP) private insurance, sliding scale fees available for uninsured clients DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, groups available in Spanish AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm , Friday-Saturday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located downtown, across from Alba Park. The cross street is Holly. Bus route 25 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Gambling Disorder Counseling Psychiatric Day Treatment Substance Use Disorder Day Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEDFORD
